[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33326719/298570221/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwMzQ1ZTkwLTdkZjItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NkkUnJ9sz0A3bBpJ654g2vDL92leqpzyDhIhK0nR9hU=&emci=503f43b9-7cf2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b0345e90-7df2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, Peter, this is Simona, Mom in Chief with the Katie Porter** #Momsquad**. Did you get our email earlier today? We have just a few hours left before our deadline tonight at midnight and I need your help. **[Can you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help us reach our July fundraising goal?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33326720/298570222/1834377524?refcode=0731&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwMzQ1ZTkwLTdkZjItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NkkUnJ9sz0A3bBpJ654g2vDL92leqpzyDhIhK0nR9hU=)** We’re still $473 short, but with your help right now, we can close the gap and make sure that we have the resources we need to keep powering our movement for paid leave, universal free preschool, and equal pay. Every single member of The GOP voted against the American Rescue Plan -- a bill that invested in vaccinations and aimed to cut the childhood poverty rate in half with monthly Child Tax Credit payments. We need to protect and expand our Democratic majority so that we can deliver on our promise to help American working families. **[Will you chip in today to protect our majority and help us re-elect Katie Porter? We can do this, but we are counting on you to get us over the finish line tonight by midnight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33326721/298570223/1834377524?refcode=0731&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwMzQ1ZTkwLTdkZjItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NkkUnJ9sz0A3bBpJ654g2vDL92leqpzyDhIhK0nR9hU=)** Your support makes our work possible, Peter. Thank you for being a part of this movement. Friend ー it’s Darin.

I still can’t believe Joe Biden has the nerve to pretend like his economy is strong. It’s a slap in the face of millions of Americans who are struggling right now.

The Biden economy is great if you don’t worry about:

**→ Paying more for rent or a house if you can buy one...**
**→ Paying more for the gas to get you to work... **
**→ Paying more to put food on your family’s table...**
**→ Paying employees to help operate your small business...**

Biden thinks this economy is great because he’s never worked a real job his entire life. Now he’s using the government to pay people to do the same thing.

**Joe Biden is destroying our economy with the same socialism that he has benefitted from his entire life.** _**We can’t let that happen.**_

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Time for Biden and the Senate to do their part
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
Over the past four days, we marched over 30 miles with the Poor People’s
Campaign and dozens of allied organizations to push the Senate and
President Biden to pass the For the People Act — and put an end to voter
suppression in Texas and across the country.

[1]Beto marching

We started in Georgetown bright and early Wednesday morning and finished
in Austin today with a voting rights rally in front of the state capitol.
Thousands of people — including Willie Nelson, who played a spirited set
at the end of the rally — showed up with amazing energy to take part in
this fight.

[2]Beto speaking

Throughout the week, we heard from members of the disability community,
low-income workers, young Texans, and others who shared powerful
first-hand stories of how voter suppression efforts in Texas would shut
them out from our democracy.

We also heard from Reverend Jesse Jackson, one of our nation’s greatest
civil rights heroes who marched from Selma to Montgomery 56 years ago, and
whose courage helped compel Congress and President Lyndon Baines Johnson
to pass the 1965 Voting Rights Act. He reminded us of the voting rights
struggle that came before us — and the voting rights struggle we have
ahead.

Taking to the streets, marching with our neighbors, and showing up in
person is how we bring more people into this fight for our democracy. But
we need our federal lawmakers to do their part. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/45933?t=1001&akid=147355%2E444211%2ElAEIiT ]I urge you to call
President Biden (202-456-1414) and ask him to make voting rights his
number one priority. It’s the only way we pass the For the People Act and
save our democracy before it’s too late.

Let’s keep the faith!

Grateful to be in this fight with you,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44727?refcode=ema20210731-147355&t=1002&akid=147355%2E444211%2ElAEIiT ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=147355%2E444211%2ElAEIiT

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: my final request:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I know it's late -- but I had to send just one more message before putting my phone down for the night.

I just reviewed my final finance update of the month, and I'm sorry to report that my House Democrats are still short of our must-hit goal.

**So since you 're one of my very best grassroots supporters, I just had to reach out one last time to see if you could chip in and help close the gap.**

Let me be absolutely clear: We cannot afford to miss this goal.

Republicans have been outraising and outspending us across the board -- and if we don't turn the tide soon, I fear we could lose our Majority and everything we've worked for.

**So please, if you could chip in $3, $10, $25 -- or anything you can spare -- before midnight, I 'd be so grateful.**

**** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Chip in $1 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)**

**[Chip in $50 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_GFa_)**

**[Chip in $100 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc64yD_)**

**[Or chip in another amount>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)**
****

Thank you,

Nancy

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45389057&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MDA0NDA5NgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45389057&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MDA0NDA5NgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Congress abandons America yet again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
Between student debt relief and the expiration of the federal eviction moratorium, congressional leaders have made clear their disdain for the compounding crises confronted by American workers & families. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78OfUg7g0bT3KWj5PFlOrwylcmVHgVhvfe2ZPl5W7AdMasrpnGX3_-K_MKzQNulBAjmA9indPMh0YwNe6_ozBJO5NpYg-IN43V5JAmNlWTQoz_qkqlKdCF9vxXE6ztK4INr2UFXFsfIvukaPR-WdPzq548Qm0zthE5WJLHXZkZO6LeS60LOEDQa_OsZwAy9QulT89G86CzG27JccPW-OfDl1HwjqiZgpIXafrOe21yN-i3qP5BHY9_tM3A8bmelpEsCeaawJyb3sWdbYA0RsT_O7g6wYRpJTjFvxH-zUALejNZ/3e3/B9o0Wqt4QYmtbSqrIA4F_Q/h0/6ZxHPHMh0g17f6MjHHD7OOL6dDtXgrEBCiTRgHqnDFM)
| | Dear Peter, Twice this week, congressional leaders thumbed their noses at the American people. Speaker Pelosi‘s comments about student debt relief reflected how little she understands the issue, before Congress went on recess before even considering an urgently needed extension of the federal election moratorium. [**Can you stand with me as we work to win a different voice for San Francisco in Washington? There’s no political party or corporate lobby behind me, so we rely entirely on grassroots—your—support.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLNAfwUorSBw6zUaW9r4UDvORtzMJCOUIr40ZAkjkeFpSY9IDWuwtdM8K85dShtY8UMY6mYnk5xw-FnaEBD8wkFYfII0nKzYYdPXdSiworNMAlX2iKpHZQX2Wb0KoL7YV0kWW9dIcyT5cUbywJ1XPNeADPwQvDTkN5iXXhXjKY0v4FGt0uIXdGNPu194iMyETWbNPczYabXKFrW7hVYDzO1AXMHsX6MoW1QpYS1ahDXT8KGkYZHSqDKOkwqh8h7KdA/3e3/B9o0Wqt4QYmtbSqrIA4F_Q/h1/QxC4RMj5nzJezvN9DHZp0I-lusIEnA8S25vBdiRbn1s) Earlier this week, Nancy Pelosi said, “Suppose...your child just decided they, at this time, [do] not want to go to college but you’re paying taxes to forgive somebody else’s obligations. You may not be happy about that." Why is the Democratic Speaker of the House repeating well-worn Republican talking points? Moreover, her comments suggest that she inaccurately considers student debt relief as a benefit to individual recipients—as opposed to an economic stimulus that would unleash the purchasing power of multiple generations currently saddled by extreme debt that constrains their consumer spending and hamstrings the broader economy. [**I had to leave college at 17 after my family lost our home to foreclosure, and remain indebted to this day from law school. Do you want a voice in Congress who understands what it’s like to struggle in today’s economy, or a powerful wealthy landlord presiding over an intergenerational family dynasty?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLNAfwUorSBw6zUaW9r4UDv-haiA34IM9bkyh5Lnc8ggtu_-t3OPk_uHGEcW49V0xom7BcSsjH5mpj8rFXlRdqQwb4ogt-SNPg8ILnueYXCwSM6LpWkh6nheVK03y7BqXxSZVpOvMSkgvv7MCjmOIWV_QJHNiENYAiVNP3BvYQLy7kLyWY4N2igJaScwkjT30DvuJ4TmjC-FMUZ1CtW7qC4tJWy3pwynnC2DD5GKMwis0Ac15TTi7ux0hYrYRnkcHk/3e3/B9o0Wqt4QYmtbSqrIA4F_Q/h2/997eCRk_8JoGxNyPtVJ62HwZ9iPoNnnESLYZz09Ptok) After demonstrating their disregard for workers & families burdened by unprecedented student debt, Pelosi and other congressional leaders then turned to renters. Pelosi chose to adjourn Congress for a 6-week recess before extending the federal election moratorium, placing millions of Americans at preventable risk of losing their homes in the midst of an escalating pandemic. So many events in Washington seem offensive that, by inundating us by one outrage after another, they threaten to overwhelm us, to lead us to adapt to a new baseline and accept it. That is a profound constitutional threat, a critical pattern that enables authoritarianism. But even by the crass & craven standards of our corrupt corporate Congress of millionaires, abandoning millions of renters is especially callous. It’s hard to outdo a refusal to even vote on universal healthcare in the midst of a pandemic that has killed well over half a million Americans, including a quarter million who died due to inadequate insurance. Somehow, Congress managed to make even that failure pale by comparison. Mass evictions are predictable, and portend an economic and humanitarian disaster. Are Democrats ignoring the issue because they’re led by a wealthy landlord? [**We’ve come closer than anyone in the generation that Pelosi has held her seat to removing her from Congress. We need your support to finish what we started—and we face a critical budget deadline today, at the end of the month. Can we count on your support?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLNAfwUorSBw6zUaW9r4UDv_E1YPU7gqcmFBtaJxUOj9Nx8IkN7WdYVgE3JE-1VIjokFW03_TCpvEKIEukRdTmdo638PXhJgq2xQHPCwIZpfiAnpRxb5i2KZq5T8_8Mqte-2_jxGVMlpLALXzzv-qxO57pSt9-ARIOeOUjHjzIWIj0V3pE-o3eKKzoSb3AI5tLHe6PdZasFJc-z1_FtmJzF9i7rXVkl4hvrxi76Lg8CrzVuu2myjKptiZ2kJfUE_NU/3e3/B9o0Wqt4QYmtbSqrIA4F_Q/h3/uubfiiEBTYZWtlvyLdfrF2cPNvsPet_DNko6EC4vk_Q) In Washington, some Members of Congress led by Rep. Cori Bush (D-MO) camped out to pressure their colleagues to reconvene. That spirit of extralegal activism is precisely what has been missing in Washington for a generation, and the animating force behind not only our campaign, but also my career over the past 20 years. Power concedes nothing without a demand. And I’ve articulated demands from the courts to the streets, helped establish new rights, and pioneered groundbreaking policy reforms at the local level replicated across the country. We can’t expect solutions from the architects of today’s crises. And they’re not going to simply retire and pass the baton. I’ve been honored to represent your voice as an advocate, even while seeking the chance to formally represent San Francisco in Congress. As Washington continues to fail from one issue to the next, I grow only more committed to doing anything I can to help and deeply appreciate any support you can offer. Are you ready to throw off the yoke of the past and demand a more humane future? Thank you for being part of the solution! Shahid |
---|---|---
|

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They want to destroy my life, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But I will never stop fighting.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049367:6xzCl_lN7:m:1:3253819041:CA25A9617A8FB44C5ADFBBEBB844906D:r)
---
Peter,
---
The Deep State is trying to destroy my life -- all because I represented President Trump against the false and despicable charges levied against him.
---
_But I want you to know something ... I have ZERO regrets._
---
**Even after the FBI raided my home and the DOJ spied on me, I would do it all over again, because President Trump is an innocent man whose constitutional rights were attacked.**
---
_But while I continue to fight for truth, freedom, and justice in America -- I 'm _personally_ asking YOU to help fight for my _**own**_ freedom, which is now in danger._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049367:6xzCl_lN7:m:1:3253819041:CA25A9617A8FB44C5ADFBBEBB844906D:r)

---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049367:6xzCl_lN7:m:1:3253819041:CA25A9617A8FB44C5ADFBBEBB844906D:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049367:6xzCl_lN7:m:1:3253819041:CA25A9617A8FB44C5ADFBBEBB844906D:r)
---
**It was startling to hear a LOUD BANG on my door at 6:00 in the morning -- and then to be greeted by 7 FBI agents, ready to raid my apartment.**
---
The agents proceeded to take seven or eight electronic devices from my home.
---
But there's one thing Biden's FBI agents refused to take: _Hunter Biden 's hard drive -- even though the warrant REQUIRED them to take it._
---
I'll tell you why they didn't take it...
---
...Because the hard drive contains EVIDENCE of the Biden Crime Family violating our country's laws for thirty years.
---
That's why liberal big tech corporations CENSORED me during the final weeks of the 2020 election every time I tried to expose incriminating evidence of the Biden Crime Family.
---
**And it 's also why the Deep State wants to throw me in jail.**
---
But, as you know, I'm a fighter just like President Trump.
---
_**Biden 's government goons can censor me, spy on me, and raid my apartment -- but I will NEVER stop fighting.**_
---
Now I hope you'll fight for my freedom.
---
**[DEFEND RUDY - CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049367:6xzCl_lN7:m:1:3253819041:CA25A9617A8FB44C5ADFBBEBB844906D:r)**
---
There's one point I want to make clear.
---
While this fund I've set up is called the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, it's not only about __my_ freedom..._
---
...It's about YOURS.
---
We need to face the brutal fact that every single American citizen's rights hang in the balance in Biden's America.
---
If the federal government can get away with these police state tactics, then America as we know it is GONE.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for _OUR_ freedoms.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049367:6xzCl_lN7:m:1:3253819041:CA25A9617A8FB44C5ADFBBEBB844906D:r)

Thank you,

name: Joe Mantegna
subject: We have a responsibility to honor their valor
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c244%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=xeUAxAmn4Sn%2fc9FtAlsGjw&sysid=1)
Hi friend, this is Joe Mantegna. You might know me from movies or TV as Joey Zasa in _The_ _Godfather_ , the voice of Fat Tony in _The Simpsons_ , or Special Agent David Rossi in the CBS series _Criminal Minds._ But what you may not know about me is that off-screen, I try to spend time raising awareness and appreciation for those who risked their lives so that we can live in freedom. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65607%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZxvKTv2jiO2YHi9Qve8iYQ&sysid=1) You see, out of the millions of brave men and women who served in World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, only about 6% are still with us today. _Most of the World War II veterans still alive are nearing or past 100 years old ... most of our Korean War veterans are in their 90s... and most of our Vietnam veterans are in their 70s and 80s._ Sadly, with hundreds of these heroes passing away every day, time is short to preserve their first-hand lessons and experiences from which future generations can learn. That’s why today, I’m asking fellow patriotic Americans like yourself to help my friends at the American Veterans Center with a special, time-sensitive project -[ **to record the personal stories of our heroic veterans from our World War II generation before it’s too late.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65608%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h98b3yD0Dan5xz%2fvrtMMww&sysid=1) _You and I understand that freedom is not free and that its price is the blood and sacrifice of generations willing to stand and serve._ **I learned those lessons from my Uncle Willie who served in General Patton’s Third Army in World War II** - _he even earned a Purple Heart for the injuries he sustained in the Battle of the Bulge._ But what I didn’t realize until later in life is that the war stories he told me weren’t just about him... They were about honoring and remembering his brothers in arms who never made it back home... the ones who never got a chance to re-start their lives like he did. I knew then that whatever I chose to do in life was because of their valor - _and I knew that I had a responsibility to honor that valor._ So, almost fifteen years ago when I met Jim Roberts - President of the American Veterans Center - I was immediately glad to offer any help I could to help honor our veterans and military heroes. You see, the American Veterans Center (or AVC) understands better than most what it means to truly honor veterans, like my Uncle Willie, and remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. That’s why they send camera crews around the country to visit our aging veterans from World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, professionally filming their personal memories of service and sacrifice, and capturing their invaluable contribution to American history. After they finish recording one of these “Oral Histories”, they post it on their YouTube page for millions of Americans to watch. Each is also donated to the Library of Congress’ Veterans History Project for preservation and use by future researchers, and are made available on request to museums and documentary films. If you’ve ever watched one of AVC’s Oral Histories, you’ll know that they are extensive, high-quality interviews where our veterans have as much time as they need to tell every detail of their remarkable service. And as a T.V. and film producer myself, I can tell you firsthand that these Oral Histories are simply breath-taking. With the pandemic waning, the AVC is working to double-down on its effort to capture the remaining stories of our World War II heroes. Right now, the AVC has identified more than 200 stories to film as soon as possible, which include:
* **The 442nd Regimental Combat Team** - Veterans of the legendary all-Japanese American unit that would become the most decorated unit in American military history for its size and length of service, being awarded eight Presidential Unit Citations, 21 Medals of Honor, and more than 4,000 Purple Hearts.
* **The Ritchie Boys** - A special unit comprised largely of Jewish immigrants and refugees from Germany and Austria, trained in counterintelligence and deployed back to Europe with the United States Army to help defeat Hitler.
* **Royce Williams** - The top scoring carrier-based naval aviator and top scoring naval aviator in a Navy jet in the Korean War and the only fighter pilot to shoot down four Soviet MIG-15s in one fight.
* **Rosie the Riveters** - The American women on the home front who worked to build the planes, tanks, and ships for our boys fighting off on the front lines.

These are just a few of the amazing stories they have lined up to record before it’s too late. But there is one challenge... In order to properly capture an Oral History - from identifying videographers to travel to equipment - it costs the American Veterans Center around $2,000. As a non-profit organization, the AVC relies almost entirely on generous Americans like you to preserve and honor the sacrifices of America’s greatest heroes. [**So, will you help my friends at the AVC record the Oral Histories of as many living WWII veterans as possible with a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $15, $35, $50 or more today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65609%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ayap48PupVzOT5dmsQjSGw&sysid=1) Right now, there are about 250 World War II veterans whose stories the AVC has identified to record. So, in order to professionally capture the Oral Histories of all 250 of the heroic veterans on their waiting list, it’s going to cost the AVC around $500,000. These memories and their history is priceless, and the time to capture them is urgent. [**That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting the AVC Oral History Project with a tax-deductible gift of $15, $35, $50 or more today. **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65600%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dwoKCcTEBxVpXjwqa3UI7g&sysid=1) If you can give more - such as $75, $100, or even $500 - that would certainly be most welcome. But please know that any amount you can afford to give today will make a real difference in helping the AVC preserve the legacies of our military veterans. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter. And thank you in advance for your help in this time-sensitive mission. _ _ Warmest regards, Joe Mantegna Actor, Director, Producer, Writer [**SUPPORT THE AVC**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65601%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sygVeBLcWf0snRqiuB3%2fkA&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65607%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZxvKTv2jiO2YHi9Qve8iYQ&sysid=1) The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65602%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mqrxNFUXvJHYO5Ts5YYnkw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65603%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bnYxWvI3Jg5Aofb2wmIRyw&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65604%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dPqmjoUCgjBBJwca4v2XEQ&sysid=1)
---|---|---
(C) American Veterans Center | [www.americanveteranscenter.org](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65615%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sivSan2DdT0cao8i22zbZg&sysid=1)
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65616%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iCq%2boNdPXBLBvDGTqTfk5w&sysid=1)
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c244%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=xeUAxAmn4Sn%2fc9FtAlsGjw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c244%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=xeUAxAmn4Sn%2fc9FtAlsGjw&sysid=1)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: do you want to meet me for dinner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
DINNER WITH MTG DEADLINE
TOMORROW AT MIDNIGHT
ENTER TO WIN

Dear Peter -- I didn't come to Washington
to make friends.
I came to fight for the PEOPLE:

Impeach Biden. Fire Fauci.
Expel Maxine Waters. End the Mask
Mandate.
Ban Critical Race Theory. . .

I'm even suing Nancy Pelosi!
These are the reason the D.C. Swamp hates me
so much. And I wouldn't have it any other way!
You see, I'd rather meet people like you,
people who actually care about America and want to preserve it
for future generations.
And that's exactly why I'm offering to fly
you and a friend up to Trump Hotel in D.C. to have dinner with
me.

All you have to do is enter to win! Even if
you've already entered, sign up again to increase your chances!
I'll cover the airfare, hotel, and dinner. .
.you just need to enter to win!
There will be two winners (each can bring a
friend)! I'll even fill you in on some behind-the-scenes stories.
We're going to have fun! Enter to win!
Good luck!
For freedom,
Marjorie Taylor Greene

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They want to destroy my life, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But I will never stop fighting.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050013:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)
---
Peter,
---
The Deep State is trying to destroy my life -- all because I represented President Trump against the false and despicable charges levied against him.
---
_But I want you to know something ... I have ZERO regrets._
---
**Even after the FBI raided my home and the DOJ spied on me, I would do it all over again, because President Trump is an innocent man whose constitutional rights were attacked.**
---
_But while I continue to fight for truth, freedom, and justice in America -- I 'm _personally_ asking YOU to help fight for my _**own**_ freedom, which is now in danger._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050013:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050014:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050015:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050016:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050017:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050018:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050013:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050013:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050013:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)
---
**It was startling to hear a LOUD BANG on my door at 6:00 in the morning -- and then to be greeted by 7 FBI agents, ready to raid my apartment.**
---
The agents proceeded to take seven or eight electronic devices from my home.
---
But there's one thing Biden's FBI agents refused to take: _Hunter Biden 's hard drive -- even though the warrant REQUIRED them to take it._
---
I'll tell you why they didn't take it...
---
...Because the hard drive contains EVIDENCE of the Biden Crime Family violating our country's laws for thirty years.
---
That's why liberal big tech corporations CENSORED me during the final weeks of the 2020 election every time I tried to expose incriminating evidence of the Biden Crime Family.
---
**And it 's also why the Deep State wants to throw me in jail.**
---
But, as you know, I'm a fighter just like President Trump.
---
_**Biden 's government goons can censor me, spy on me, and raid my apartment -- but I will NEVER stop fighting.**_
---
Now I hope you'll fight for my freedom.
---
**[DEFEND RUDY - CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050013:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)**
---
There's one point I want to make clear.
---
While this fund I've set up is called the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, it's not only about __my_ freedom..._
---
...It's about YOURS.
---
We need to face the brutal fact that every single American citizen's rights hang in the balance in Biden's America.
---
If the federal government can get away with these police state tactics, then America as we know it is GONE.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for _OUR_ freedoms.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050013:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050013:JzUvH_lyN:m:1:3253819041:E16F3DABFF2ACFBF6D511797A99DBBED:r)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | _[View online](https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGl6T1&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ESm1N7&)_

| | |
---
| | **Threats and rules....Time to push back.**
---
| | ** ****The Biden administration is threatening vaccine mandates to federal employees, vaccine passes, mask mandates, and lockdowns.** The director of the CDC Rochelle Walensky even said the silent part out loud with her statement that vaccine passes [ _" may very well be a path forward."_](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Si1mgw&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EwI9Css&)
**But if Biden was actually concerned with rising COVID cases why would they allow the border to be wide open?**
Governor Abbot of Texas has cited a [_900 percent increase_ _in the number of migrant detainees who tested positive for COVID-19._](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Si1mnT&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhXiIfo&) But somehow rising COVID cases is _our fault?_ To me, it seems clear. Biden and his administration care about power and control over the American people. If the Democrats genuinely thought masking up would keep them safe, good O'l Joe wouldn't have been [_mingling in a massless crowd without a mask on himself._](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Si1ma0&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EGNWJEj&)
**And where has Newhouse been as our rights are being decimated right in front of us?**
He's been siding with the leftists, voting with Pelosi on a massive amnesty bill, taking donations from companies like Walmart and Amazon that raked in cash from COVID lockdowns and restrictions while you, the average American was forced out of work or to permanently shutter your business.
---
|
---
**We must stop the Democrat from turning our nation into a communist nightmare!**
Together we can stand for America and its exceptionalism, we can push back against the overreach of this administration and the people who are "America Last" like Dan Newhouse. We can't do it without each other. I need your help to kick Newhouse out of office and go to Washington D.C. with the "America First" agenda that the 4th District of Washington State represents.
Our district can be _the_ example to America that there is hope. That the American people are not going to hand over our country to communism but protect our Constitutional Republic. I need your contributions to make it to Congress so I can represent you and the nation we cherish. United we will keep our land.
It's an honor to serve.
**_I'm_**[** _counting on yo_**](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=Si1m4a&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECbr92p&)** _u._**
Loren

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049337:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049337:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049337:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049337:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049337:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049337:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049337:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049337:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049338:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049337:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049339:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049340:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049341:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049342:JJgXh_lNY:m:1:3253819041:E77F8E978A8C0F8DF751D207901612D6:r)
---|---|---

The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|--- {{unsubscribeUrl}} This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. Peter,

The teachers union are declaring war on our children and our country.

**[_Over the weekend, the nation's largest teachers union (the NEA) approved a plan to promote Critical Race Theory in ALL 50 states and over 14,000 local school districts._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049475:6fRCc_l_N:m:1:3253819041:4609A29C9FA2BD5AF89D3336E92FDE81:r)**

**Eliminating CRT is THE most important issue of our time.** The leftists have control over Hollywood, higher education, and the news. If they brainwash our children with progressive propaganda, America will cease to be America.

**LOOK AT WHAT THEY ARE TEACHING KINDERGARTNERS:**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049475:6fRCc_l_N:m:1:3253819041:4609A29C9FA2BD5AF89D3336E92FDE81:r)
**_[Please DONATE NOW to stand with Parents Against Critical Theory as we FIGHT BACK against the Critical Race Theory and the teachers unions. We can 't do it without grassroots supporters like YOU! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049475:6fRCc_l_N:m:1:3253819041:4609A29C9FA2BD5AF89D3336E92FDE81:r)_**

**Critical Race Theory teaches that "whiteness" is evil, that parents are "dissenters," and that ALL white people are "oppressors."**

_The Left might've gone off the rails, but we can't let them drag our children down with them._ This is more important than any election. Parents Against Critical Theory will not rest until CRT has been COMPLETELY defeated.

**But we need your help, Peter.** As we like to say, _" We're so grassroots, we need our grass-cut!"_ We truly do rely on the generosity of American Patriots like YOU.

**Will you join us and fight for objective curriculum in our children's schools?**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I’m extremely grateful for everything you do
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for your support this past month and for being a part of this team.
Whether you donated, shared our social media posts, or simply read our emails and stayed up to date with what’s going on — every action you take supports this ongoing mission for our shared values. And I want you to know that I’m extremely grateful for everything you do.
We just wrapped up our July fundraising deadline — and my team is still combing over the numbers — but from what we can tell, our results are going to be great. And we have you to thank for that.
Now I won’t take up too much more of your time. Just know that the months ahead are going to be critical for building up this team so we can prepare to hold this seat in 2022. I look forward to what’s next knowing that I have you all by my side, it really makes all of the difference.
Full speed ahead,
— Mark
If you are able, please consider making a donation to help fuel our people-powered campaign.
We need to keep up the pace in 2021, and anything you can give will go a long way since we don’t take a dime of corporate PAC money.
We appreciate your support!
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210801-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1074_6688874_DAibMT&akid=1074%2E6688874%2EDAibMT)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1074%2E6688874%2EDAibMT).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Chief James Craig
subject: why Detroit didn’t burn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049557:JWwga_lNV:m:1:3253819041:98297401210F4B1FED939E3D18A3229B:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049557:JWwga_lNV:m:1:3253819041:98297401210F4B1FED939E3D18A3229B:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049557:JWwga_lNV:m:1:3253819041:98297401210F4B1FED939E3D18A3229B:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049557:JWwga_lNV:m:1:3253819041:98297401210F4B1FED939E3D18A3229B:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049557:JWwga_lNV:m:1:3253819041:98297401210F4B1FED939E3D18A3229B:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049557:JWwga_lNV:m:1:3253819041:98297401210F4B1FED939E3D18A3229B:r)

**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049557:JWwga_lNV:m:1:3253819041:98297401210F4B1FED939E3D18A3229B:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**

clean_body: | | Peter, Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan... But not Detroit. Why? I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn. See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs. I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens. But there's more to the "why?" than that. When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. I was the first in that day, leading from the front. Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. That's the why. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that? Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership. I don't see much of that out there. So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican. I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain. And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values. And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!" I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth. Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values. When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time. And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly. Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen. Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Despite the tragic outcome, Republicans keep doubling down on Trump’s anti-democratic lies.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: I'm standing up for America's political prisoners
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Watch my latest press conference. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/political-prisoners-2472802?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ae29566f91&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

This is an unpopular opinion among the elites in Washington...

...but the January 6 protestors are Americans, they have constitutional rights, and they deserve to be treated with equality under the law. The way the jail guards and staff treated and verbally threatened me, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz and Louie Gohmert reinforced the claim of abuse asserted by attorney James McBride.

[Watch me speak out on their behalf](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f1190147a2&e=645b3b1338):

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=b6ea889f7c&e=645b3b1338)

Many of these protestors -- and most who haven't even been charged with a violent crime -- are rotting in a D.C. jail without bail, awaiting trial.

They are in solitary confinement, abused by jail guards, not given access to lawyers, have been overcharged with bogus felonies, and have no trial dates in sight.

We went to visit them today -- a normal activity for members of Congress -- _and we were kicked out of the jail_.

It's long past time that our Justice Department answers this very serious question: why are mostly peaceful American protestors being treated worse than terrorists held at GITMO?

Many in the Republican establishment are afraid to speak out about this, and the Communist Democrats are happy they're being punished.

_But I refuse to abandon these Americans_.

[_**Show me you have my back -- and theirs -- by contributing to my election campaign today**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e23627c2c6&e=645b3b1338).

Defying the establishment like this, and standing up for these politically persecuted Trump supporters, comes at a cost.

I'm already one of the NUMBER ONE targets for the RINOs in Washington.

They've said explicitly that they want to find a primary opponent to try to take me out:

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=62f817d5de&e=645b3b1338)

_But I won't stop_.

I will continue to seek justice for the Trump supporters rotting in the D.C. jail, and I will continue to put America First.

[**_You can help me by contributing to my reelection campaign right away, so I can fend off any primary challenger I might face from the D.C. Swamp_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=641549f555&e=645b3b1338).

[_**I need your generous contributions today so I can continue to battle the RINOs and the Communist Democrats on behalf of the America First movement -- including fighting for the rights of the protestors being unjustly held in jail**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=6346744914&e=645b3b1338).

In America, you are never supposed to be punished before being convicted of a crime.

Our Fifth Amendment gives us the right to due process.

The mostly peaceful January 6 protestors are _clearly_ being punished right now -- and none of them have even gone to trial yet.

As I asked at my press conference: where is the ACLU? Where is Human Rights Watch? Where is Amnesty International?

Why aren't these groups standing up for the unjustly persecuted American patriots?

The answer is simple: because these "watchdogs" exist to do the bidding of the Communist Democrats, and globalist Special Interests.

They are partisans, not watchdogs.

_I won't back down until these wrongs are righted_.

[_**But I need your support now more than ever**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=de61a46fb7&e=645b3b1338).

[_**By contributing $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or MORE to my reelection campaign right away, you're helping me stay in the fight, so I can keep battling to get to the bottom of the political persecution of these Trump-supporting protestors**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=866080ebb0&e=645b3b1338).
---
| Thank you for your attention to this urgent matter, and for your generous support.

For Freedom,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ec4c19b9f6&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The mostly peaceful January 6 protestors are being held as political prisoners in Washington.

subject: Christie55 In The News
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
### Christie55 In The News
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=6c295b5e4d&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**The Hill**

**Chris Christie: Unvaccinated people don't want to be 'indoctrinated' by government**

Former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie (R) advised officials working to convince unvaccinated Americans to receive a coronavirus inoculation to focus on explaining the facts about vaccines rather than mandates.

"The vaccines do work," Christie said Sunday on ABC's "This Week." "Every focus group I've been in, Republicans who are not vaccinated, you have to walk them through the logic of this."

Christie added that vaccine-hesitant Americans "don't want to be indoctrinated."

[_Read more_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=ad3c67814f&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=faffb201d9&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Fox News**

**Chris Christie to help raise money for Republicans running in governors races**

Former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie is being tasked to co-chair a new effort by the Republican Governors Association (RGA) to expand the organization’s donor network to help its fundraising[ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=5d2bff311c&e=65ae29fa7e)for GOP incumbents and candidates running in the 2021 and 2022 gubernatorial elections.

The new role for Christie, which an RGA official confirmed to Fox News, gives the 2016 GOP presidential candidate and potential 2024 White House hopeful another high profile position to keep his name in the headlines as he helps fundraise for fellow Republicans.

[_Read and watch here_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=425f851e96&e=65ae29fa7e)
|
---
| | [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=1e4cb3dee3&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Guy Benson Show**

**Chris Christie Calls On NJ Gov. Murphy To Punish Ben & Jerry's Over Move To Boycott Israeli Settlements**

[_Listen Now_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=32d77cdf0f&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=e9d68b4efd&e=65ae29fa7e)
---
**Axios AM**

**Chris Christie Featured in Axios AM: July 26, 2021**

It's in everyone's interest to _persuade _the unvaccinated to get the jab, rather than shame them. Chris Christie said it exactly right yesterday on ABC's "This Week":
* "What they don't want is to be indoctrinated — they're willing to be vaccinated," the former New Jersey governor said. "And so let's be smart about this."
* "I think that one of the places where our leaders have fallen down is they're not explaining it," Christie added. "They're just saying: Get vaccinated. ... [T]hese folks do not respond to being ordered to do those things."

[_Read more_](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=6c6e9c2e08&e=65ae29fa7e)

subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049706:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049706:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049706:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049706:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049706:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049706:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049706:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049706:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049707:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049706:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049708:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049709:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049710:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58049711:JSydn_lqN:m:1:3253819041:42F2FCB55F90A7EC1C2DF8171B4B7AD8:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Cox=20for=20Governor?=
subject: More Masks, Seriously?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc
body:
This week we saw more inconsistent mask messaging from Newsom as he recommended Californians wear indoor masks - regardless of vaccination status. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/votejohncox/8jt85jsn9d-4958206?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=5eff300a12&e=b8a6795190)
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=94fb44baaa&e=b8a6795190)
---
### Newsom’s Misleading Pandemic Message
This week we saw more inconsistent mask messaging from Gavin Newsom as he recommended Californians wear indoor masks once again - regardless of vaccination status. [On Twitter](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=be5e0985aa&e=b8a6795190), John Cox called Newsom out: **“@GavinNewsom is back at it again, sending the wrong message about the pandemic when only .039% of vaccinated Californians have gotten an infection. This will only increase vaccine hesitancy and harm businesses across this state.”** Over the past few months, Cox has shared that he is vaccinated, but is **strongly opposed to mandating vaccines for the coronavirus** and imposing unnecessary mask restrictions for vaccinated individuals.“I think people should get vaccinated, and **I think people should be doing it voluntarily** ,” Cox shared in a recent interview. “Frankly, I think the idea of making the vaccine mandatory, and actually requiring mask-wearing on the part of vaccinated people, is counterproductive to getting people to believe in it.”Even the courts see that Newsom’s overreaching this past year has been unconstitutional. The California-based U.S. Court of Appeals****[**ruled against Newsom’s mandates**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f375677147&e=b8a6795190)**** during the pandemic in his move to prevent children from receiving in-person teaching in private schools.Earlier this week, Cox made the following statement:
### Uncertainty Around Schools Reopening
**“We’re going to try” has been the catchphrase for insiders** throughout the pandemic. It was used once again this week and this time while addressing whether schools will reopen in the fall. American Federation of Teachers President Randi Weingarten spoke with MSNBC on Wednesday and did not give a definitive answer regarding the matter. **It’s time that we put the power in the hands of parents, not politicians.** The [research](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=3bb66c754d&e=b8a6795190) points to the importance of kids returning to school in person and the damage that’s been done. Because of how the pandemic was handled, students are 4 months behind in reading and 5 in math. Gavin Newsom needs to stop playing politics with our children’s future.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=04a39a613e&e=b8a6795190)
### In Case You Missed It
[**Watch the recap video**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=fa42c61a8d&e=b8a6795190) of John’s statewide bus tour this past month where he shared his plan to solve homelessness.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1ac6aad6c2&e=b8a6795190)
| [Read John’s Homelessness Policy Plan](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=62185af96d&e=b8a6795190)
---
### It’s Debate Time!
**Don’t miss the gubernatorial debate on August 4th!** Mark your calendars and submit your questions [here](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=800d08b25c&e=b8a6795190). John will share more of his beastly solutions to save California. You won’t want to miss it.
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=ca864e4949&e=b8a6795190)
### We’re So Close
Recent polling is showing a surge in energy backing the recall. [**In an article by CalMatters**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=b5c629f085&e=b8a6795190) , Dan Walter shared the poll results. “The poll, conducted by the Institute of Governmental Studies at UC-Berkeley, found that 50% of likely voters favor Newsom, but nearly as many, 47%, favor the recall. While Newsom enjoys a strong lead among all registered voters, the poll said Republicans are highly motivated to turn out and vote against the governor, while Democrats and independents tend to be apathetic.”
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=c50d15d95a&e=b8a6795190)
**It’s your support and enthusiasm that is driving this recall.** It’s going to take a collective effort to recall Gavin Newsom and that includes your financial support. Your contributions are necessary to get the message out and finish strong! Thank you for giving and playing a crucial part in this historic opportunity. Together we can recall this governor.
| [Contribute Now & Recall Newsom](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=76572f6418&e=b8a6795190)
---
| [Follow the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=3c3c53bb07&e=b8a6795190)
---
### [VoteForTheBeast.com](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1e701ef885&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=0ecb759f5b&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=0c06845076&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1c5e5d213d&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=2e37a71a7b&e=b8a6795190)
---|---|---|---
### [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=d20711a041&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.
| | | Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc. FPPC ID #14377013525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199
[Add us to your address book](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256) [Update Preferences](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=707677d94b) | [Unsubscribe](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=707677d94b)

body:

We're so grateful for grassroots Democrats like you.

**Last night, we officially surpassed our End of Month goal --_all thanks to this stellar grassroots team!_**

**[So as a huge thank you, we want to send you an "Anti GOP" sticker. Claim yours before midnight! >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

After Republicans broke FOUR monthly fundraising records in a row, we were worried we'd fall short of our mission-critical goal.

**But thankfully, with grassroots Democrats like you on our team, we 're ready to protect our House Majority.**

And since grassroots supporters _(like you)_ are such an integral part of our team, we couldn't think of a better way to extend our gratitude than by sending you an "Anti GOP" sticker.

Will you claim your sticker before midnight so we can thank you for your support?

---
[Quickly, don't miss out \-- claim your FREE "Anti GOP" sticker as a token of our appreciation >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
